title: Add AVX-512 SIMD backend
description: Implement AVX-512 (512-bit vector) support for all existing SIMD kernels. This includes wider logical operations, wider carry-less multiplication (VPCLMULQDQ), and potential GF2P8AFFINEQB for GF(2^8) operations. Would provide ~2x throughput improvement over AVX2 on supported CPUs.
